title: I Release Fear of Big Numbers and Allow Multi-Million Confidence
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing intimidation around large-scale investment and opening to confidence at that level
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 75 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the intimidation around seven-figure decisions. The allow names the calm confidence of someone who handles large-scale investment as a normal part of their wealth building.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 75 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 75 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 75 theme: anchoring trust in multi-million investments. The release names the fear that large-scale investing is too big or too risky. The allow names the settled confidence of handling it with due diligence and the right team.
I am ready to release every belief that large-scale investment is too intimidating, too risky, or beyond my ability to handle with wisdom. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the calm, confident energy of someone who manages multi-million investments with ease, trust, and a strong team behind them. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 75 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
